programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc:
On Huckberry Homes, we’ll be tapping into the most inspiring members of the Huckberry community to offer an inside peek into how they’ve crafted the place they call home. We will showcase everything from cold plunges to vinyl listening rooms, home gyms and offices, and other tools that inspire creativity and high-performing lives.
For our first entry, we turned to Austin, Texas’ own Scott Ballew. Our good buddy, Scott, is a filmmaker and songwriter who owns a Bohemian bungalow in the heart of Austin’s first suburb. It’s a home now that serves as a creative incubator, gathering place, hideaway, recording studio -- and maybe, as a personal shrine of a man curated by the man himself.

programme.title: Xplash Ep102

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Ken Shamrock’s Iron Man competition comes to a head as two contestants battle it out for the number one spot. Every strike, every takedown matters—because only one can walk away crowned the victor. But there’s no time to celebrate. It’s mission day. After a quick live-fire break, the team receives critical intel from the ISR daylight crew. The risk spikes as night falls and the mission is suddenly altered, forcing the contestants to adapt on the fly. With Red Cat providing coordination from above, the squad is redeployed under new marching orders and even higher stakes. A partially compromised team makes survival uncertain, but when the moment of truth arrives, the team leader takes decisive action—leading a direct breach on the target. One bold decision shifts the course of the mission entirely, and its success now hangs by a thread.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen kicks off Wild Shots with a coast-to-coast deep dive into American gun culture. From the first colonial settlement to Capitol Hill, he explores the origins of the Second Amendment and the modern fight to protect it. Along the way, he teams up with top firearms experts and puts iconic weapons to the test—including a brutal challenge to see just how many rounds it takes to break an AR-15.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen teams up with SEAL Team 6 legend Don Mann to tackle real-world defense tactics and home-clearing techniques. A visit to Civil War battlefields connects history to modern freedoms, while the brutal 5-Year AR Challenge pushes an AR-15 through 10,000 rounds without cleaning. Will the rifle survive—or fail under fire?

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Isles of the Queen

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Skull
programme.desc: The Three Mesquiteers appeared in several Republic Pictures during the 1930s, and this is considered one of their best. It's about a mysterious murder at an archeological expedition, which leads the three prairie pals into some dangerous territory. Can...

programme.title: The Red Rope
programme.desc: Hired killers and Old West outlaws stand front and center in this riveting tale from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Bob Steele, one of the busiest stars in movie history (everything from the silent era to Republic Pictures to working with Clint Eastwood in Ha...

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Ride the outlaws' highway! Allan Rocky Lane stars as Red Ryder, shootin' and fightin' his way to justice in this old slugfest from Republic Pictures. This time he's a stagecoach driver battling a crooked land commissioner and his cohorts, including a s...

programme.title: A Lust to Kill
programme.desc: An imprisoned outlaw escapes and goes on the hunt for his brothers murderers, who just happen to be members of the outlaws own gang. He and his beloved hit the trail, but are pursued by local law enforcement, who have their own plans for justice. Starr...

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine...

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: Little Joe finds a gypsy girl who, believing she's bewitched, is banished by her people. He must rescue her.

programme.title: Dead Man
programme.desc: On the run after murdering a man, accountant William Blake encounters a strange Native American named Nobody.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured.

programme.title: The Debt
programme.desc: A friendship grows between a wounded bandit and a French-Canadian engineer who nurses him back to health.

programme.title: Pirates of San Francisco
programme.desc: A sailor, a barmaid and a newspaperman join forces to clean up a lawless city.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: Zorro must save a young man who receives a death sentence after protesting unfair taxes.

programme.title: Zorro

programme.title: Last Train From Gun Hill
programme.desc: Marshal's (Kirk Douglas) wife killed by his best friend's (Anthony Quinn) son.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: Widow (Olivia de Havilland) helps Southern widower (Alan Ladd) with mute son after Civil War.

programme.title: Thunder Over the Plains
programme.desc: A Union captain (Randolph Scott) is ordered to protect carpetbaggers in his native state of Texas.

programme.title: Guns in the Dark ,1937 57
programme.desc: A drifter with a mysterious past arrives in a troubled town and becomes entangled in a dangerous conflict between ruthless outlaws and the forces of law and order.

programme.title: Hellfire Austin .1932
programme.desc: A fearless cowboy known as “Hellfire” Austin rides into danger as he confronts outlaws and fights to bring justice to the lawless frontier

programme.title: Law of the West
programme.desc: A lawman returns to a troubled frontier town to confront a ruthless gang, risking his life to restore justice and protect innocent settlers

programme.title: High Lonesome 1950, John Drew Barrymore
programme.desc: A young drifter accused of murder must prove his innocence while being hunted across the frontier by a determined posse

programme.title: Gold- 1932
programme.desc: A determined cowboy becomes involved in a dangerous struggle over a valuable gold discovery. As greedy outlaws attempt to seize the claim, he fights to protect the rightful owners and bring law and order to the frontier.

programme.title: Terror at Black Falls (1962)
programme.desc: In Terror at Black Falls, a quiet frontier town is shaken when a bitter land feud erupts into violence. With murder, betrayal, and greed tearing the community apart, one man must stand against the terror sweeping the valley. Gritty, fast-paced, and filled with danger, this hard-hitting Western lives up to its name.

programme.title: Tulsa 1949
programme.desc: Set against the roaring Oklahoma oil boom of the 1920s, Stuart Heisler’s drama follows Cherokee Lansing, a rancher’s daughter driven by vengeance after her father’s death at the hands of ruthless oilmen. With the help of Native American Jim Redbird and rugged roustabout Brad Brady, Cherokee plunges headfirst into the high-stakes world of oil drilling—where ambition, betrayal, and desire fuel every move.

programme.title: Django the Avenger 1969
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger appears to be on a mission of revenge

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You
programme.desc: This sequel to the popular spaghetti western "Clint the Stranger" was released four years after the success of the first film and essentially uses the same plot. George Martin returns as Clint (renamed Trinity in some countries), an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. One major differences in the plot when compared to the first film is the addition of Klaus Kinski as a ruthless bounty hunter. The bounty hunter tracks Clint down and forces him to return to his violent ways to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 at Noon
programme.desc: The latest local, regional and national news events of the morning are presented by the NewsChannel 3 Team along with updates on continuing stories that affect the area and up-to-the-minute business, sports, weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 Live at Five
programme.desc: A comprehensive examination of the major local, regional, state and national news events of the day and issues affecting business, economics, local sports, weather conditions and traffic are presented by the NewsChannel 3 Evening News Team.

programme.title: CBS Local 2 News at 5:30pm
programme.desc: The veteran CBS Local 2 News Team presents the latest headline news from around the community, along with current and coming weather conditions, up-to-the-minute traffic report, sports highlights and much more for area viewers.

programme.title: News Channel 3 Live at 6PM
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News Team presents local, regional, state and national news along with the latest breaking news events, updates on road conditions and the week's weather forecast for residents living in the Palm Springs, California, region.
